chunks.title: Oracle Against Ammon
chunks.reason: A complete oracle concerning the sons of Ammon with judgment and future restoration.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Edom
chunks.reason: A complete oracle concerning Edom detailing their destruction and the Lord's judgment.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Damascus
chunks.reason: A complete oracle concerning Damascus and its allies with specific judgments.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Kedar and Hazor
chunks.reason: A complete oracle concerning the eastern nomads and Hazor under Nebuchadnezzar.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Elam
chunks.reason: A complete oracle concerning Elam with judgment and a promise of restoration in the last days.
